title: V-Model traceability — link-types catalog schema
description: Validates the shape of link-types.catalog.json. The catalog enumerates every traceability link type defined in TARGET_ARCHITECTURE §7: the seven canonical forward links, one reserved entry for the future Build workflow (realizes), and a reverse-derived block documenting tool-computed inverses. Schema is intentionally narrow — it validates catalog shape only. ID-format enforcement for targets lives inside per-artifact schemas; cross-artifact resolution is a runtime concern of the traceability validator tool.

version.description: Monotonic integer version of the catalog shape + content. Bumped when link-type entries are added, renamed, or structurally changed.

reverse_derived.description: Tool-computed reverse links. Never stored in artifact front-matter. Listed here so skills and tools know which inverse queries are supported (and that they should not look for stored values).

link_name.description: snake_case name matching the field or block that carries the link in the source artifact.

source_kind_enum.description: artifact = spec-side artifact (one of the six canonical types). build_artifact = future Build-workflow artifact (code file, test file, deployment config). Reserved for forward compatibility.

target_kind_enum.description: artifact = the link points at another artifact by id. scope = the link points at a node in the scope tree (used by ADR scope_tags / affected_scopes).

granularity_enum.description: artifact = link addresses the target as a whole. field_allowed = link may address a specific field inside the target (TARGET §7 reserves this for verifies only).

status_enum.description: active = in use today. reserved = declared for forward compatibility, not emitted by any spec-side artifact (realizes, pending Build workflow).

source_artifact_types.description: When source_kind = 'artifact', the set of artifact types permitted as source. Omitted when source_kind = 'build_artifact'.

source_carrier.description: Where inside the source artifact the link is carried. Canonical values: front_matter, decomposition_child, test_case_or_artifact. Tools use this to locate the link during parse.

target_artifact_types.description: When target_kind = 'artifact', the set of artifact types permitted as target. Omitted when target_kind = 'scope'.

allOf.description: source_kind = build_artifact forbids source_artifact_types (build artifacts are not spec-side).
target_kind = scope forbids target_artifact_types (scope references live in the scope tree, not the artifact registry).

from.description: Name of the forward link this reverse is computed from. Must match a link_types entry in this catalog (cross-reference checked at tool load, not by this schema).

stored.description: Always false. Reverse links are derived from the forward graph, never written into artifact front-matter. The field is retained (rather than inferred) so consumers fail loudly if a future revision tries to flip it.
